misc.text: ¡¡MARAVILLOSO CAPÍTULO EL #OnePiece1186 😍😍😍!! La portada de Loki niño me ha roto un poco el corazón y el final del flashback de Brook me lo ha partido por la mitad😭😭😭 Nos faltaría la parte de Gunko para saber qué pasó. Y regresamos al presente con Luffy pegando a Imu 🤩🤩🤩 Shonen Jump (@shonenjump) Can Brook save the fallen Princess? Read One Piece, Ch. 1,186 in Shonen Jump for free! bit.ly/4aYaASr — https://nitter.net/shonenjump/status/2071249542008234404#m

misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1186] So I went back since the beginning and intro of imu reveal, till current chpt & put all together each face, image of imu. In every image of Imu, Oda has made sure to hide the left side
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1186] So I went back since the beginning and intro of imu reveal, till current chpt & put all together each face, image of imu. In every image of Imu, Oda has made sure to hide the left side & middle of imu face. The only other person he has done this for is Sanji. Sanji that was about to marry a third eye tribe woman. Could Imu have a third eye or something else?

misc.title: #ONEPIECE Finally the confirmation(if we trust the anime source) and what I always told everyone before. The left side is the second world(800 years ago), the right side is the first world(3000 years
misc.text: #ONEPIECE Finally the confirmation(if we trust the anime source) and what I always told everyone before. The left side is the second world(800 years ago), the right side is the first world(3000 years ago?).. Sun God Nika and Joyboy are two different things... Video
